expectations.text: Produces a structured severity-graded readiness report despite no explicit phrase
expectations.evidence: Full Verdict + 🔴/🟠/🔵/✅ report produced from a casual 'before this goes live' prompt.

expectations.text: Identifies the blank Postgres datasource password as a critical config finding
expectations.evidence: Critical [config] at application.properties:5 — 'DB password is blank and hardcoded'.

Lays out what to fix first, ordered by severity

expectations.text: Every finding cites a concrete file:line location
